title: Verify access token expiration and seamless refresh using the refresh token
description: Tests that the short-lived (15 min) access token expires correctly and that the application automatically uses the refresh token to obtain a new access token without user interruption.
preconditions: User is logged in to the application.
Developer tools are available to monitor network traffic.

steps.description: 2. Wait for more than 15 minutes but less than 24 hours.
3. Perform an action that requires an API call to a protected endpoint (e.g., navigate to a new page).

expected_result: The initial API call with the expired token fails (401 Unauthorized). The application then transparently sends a request to a refresh token endpoint, receives a new access token, and automatically retries the original failed API call, which now succeeds. The user experiences no visible error.
